transcript.content: My manager took credit for my idea again today.
It's probably been around since forever ...
It definitely hasn't been around forever, it was my specific design proposal. And it's not even the first time this has happened, it keeps happening and absolutely no one else notices.
I like it , but I don't like the idea of the banner design .
I'm not even talking about a banner design, that's not what this is about. I guess I just feel invisible at that job, like my actual contributions don't matter to anyone.
Well , you don't have to be a part of the logo .
What logo are you even talking about? You're completely missing what I'm saying. Like, what is even the point of trying hard or putting in any effort if everything I do is just never seen?
Not ?
Anyway, it happened again just now in a meeting. Same exact thing as before, they just took the credit and I sat there like a ghost.
(no response generated)
I know I probably sound like a broken record repeating myself, but it's really just this one thing bugging me so much and I can't seem to get past it.
(no response generated)
It's just so frustrating because I put so much of my own time and energy into these proposals, and then to watch someone else get all the praise for them is incredibly draining.
they ? I lol ...
Yeah, my manager and the rest of the leadership team. It's not funny at all. It's exhausting to have my hard work treated like a joke or just completely ignored.
, caut is

Are you even listening to what I'm saying? It's like you're speaking a completely different language. It's just really frustrating to feel this invisible, both at my job and apparently even when trying to talk about it here.
horizontity , .... and shenan ?.they

Honestly, I don't even know what you're trying to say. This is exactly what I mean about feeling completely unseen and unheard. I'm trying to talk about how draining it is to have my hard work stolen, and I'm just getting complete gibberish back.
too

It is incredibly frustrating. It's like no matter where I turn, whether it's at my actual office or even just trying to vent about it here, nobody is actually listening to me. I just want my hard work to be recognized for once instead of being brushed aside or ignored.
's, lawyering

Are you serious? Lawyering? I am not trying to 'lawyer' anyone, I am just trying to express how incredibly disheartened I am that my manager stole my credit again. You are making absolutely no sense, and it is honestly just making me feel even more shut out.
your point's

My point is that it sucks to be completely ignored. I'm sitting here pouring my heart out about how demoralizing it is to have my ideas taken from me at work, and you're just giving me weird, dismissive one-word responses. It's just really discouraging.
.maybe

Exactly, 'maybe.' It's like my feelings and my hard work are just a giant question mark to everyone. I'm just so tired of feeling like my voice doesn't count for anything at all, whether I'm at my desk or trying to talk about it.
horizont . Debored

What does 'horizont' and 'debored' even mean? You're literally just throwing random words at me while I'm trying to talk about feeling completely invisible and unappreciated. It's like my frustration doesn't even register as real to anyone.
deficitating
